message:
fix(harness): fix gate report pass propagation, quarantine policy, differential runner stubs, and add leapfrog join checksums

Corrections and additions across the test harness crate:

confidence_gates.rs:
- Fix apply_contract_outcome_to_gate_report(): when enforcement passes,
  set global_decision to Pass (was only setting Fail on failure, leaving
  a stale decision on success).

differential_runner.rs:
- Give StubExecutor distinct engine identities (FrankenSqlite vs
  CSqliteOracle) to match real differential runner semantics. Previous
  stubs used CSqliteOracle for both sides, masking identity-related bugs.

oracle.rs:
- Add leapfrog_join_golden_blake3.json to NON_FIXTURE_JSON_FILES
  exclusion list so it is not loaded as a test fixture.

ratchet_policy.rs:
- Fix quarantine re-entry: only allow quarantine continuation when
  quarantine_enabled is true in the policy. Previously any test with a
  stale quarantine_reason could remain in quarantine even when the
  feature was disabled.

New files:
- conformance/leapfrog_join_golden_blake3.json: Golden BLAKE3 checksums
  for leapfrog join operator verification across 4 query patterns.
- tests/bd_2qr3a_5_leapfrog_golden_checksums.rs: E2E test that
  verifies leapfrog join results against golden checksums.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
